A Cultural Infrastructure Company

Culture is the new technology.

The next trillion-dollar advantage will not come from software. It will come from understanding people, culture, and the forces that move markets.

Explore the ecosystemInvestor Relations
We are the scientists of the intangibles
The Turn

For a century, technology was the engine. Now culture is.

The Old Engine

User Interface · Efficiency · Consolidation · Data · Mass Communication · Innovation

→
The New Engine

Beliefs · Perspective · Lifestyle · Language · Social Order · Globalization · Style · Values · Community

We made the intangible measurable.

The Architecture

One signal. Three layers. A flywheel.

Behavior becomes intelligence. Intelligence becomes a benchmark. The benchmark feeds the behavior. The loop compounds, and we own every turn of it.

Layer One

INDIGGI™

Consumer Cultural AI Destination

Where the signal is born. Millions of cultural decisions, what people choose, share, and believe, captured at the source.

Layer Two

Cultural Resonance Monitor™

Real-Time Cultural Intelligence

Where the signal becomes intelligence, read in real time by the brands, agencies, corporations, and governments navigating the shift.

Layer Three

The Cultural Index™

Institutional Benchmark

Where culture becomes capital. The standard the markets price against, a benchmark for the most powerful psychographic in history.

Behavior→Intelligence→Benchmark
↻ the loop reinvests in the behavior
Who We Serve

Culture is everyone's blind spot. We make it their edge.

As urbanization accelerates, the old playbooks stop resonating. We give the brands, institutions, and governments navigating the shift the intelligence to stay ahead of it.

Brands & Agencies · The marketers

"Our playbook stopped resonating with the new consumer."

Real-time resonance, so you read the shift before it breaks. Powered by the Cultural Resonance Monitor.

Corporations & Product · The builders

"We are building for a consumer we no longer recognize."

The New Urban psychographic, scored and validated, so your roadmap meets the market where it actually is. Powered by New Urban™.

Governments & Cities · The public square

"Our programs keep missing the communities they serve."

Cultural intelligence for the public sector, so policy and investment land where they are meant to. Powered by the Monitor.

Capital Markets · The allocators

"Culture moves value we still cannot price."

A benchmark you can underwrite, culture measured into an asset you can hold a position on. Powered by the Cultural Index.

The Moat

Foundation models are a commodity. Culture is not.

Anyone can rent the model. No one can rent twenty-five years of cultural fluency, or the data, scoring, and psychology that turn it into proof.

01 — The Model

New Urban™

A human algorithm. A psychographic model for the most powerful consumer mindset ever to form, the sensibility shaping the global marketplace.

02 — The Method

Values-Centered Psychology™

Why people choose what they choose. Measured, not guessed, the framework that turns belief into something a board can act on.

03 — The Asset

Validated Resonance Scoring

Proprietary cultural data, scored and validated. The defensible asset no foundation model holds, and none can reproduce.
